reviews.review_msg: I had Corey as a TA for Engl115 last fall. He is one of the best TA's I've encountered at SFU so far. He encourages engagement and class discussion with activities during tutorials/labs. He explains concepts well and his reasons for marking clearly. I would not hesitate to take a class with him again.

Corey did an amazing job TA'ing ENG 115. Corey came well prepared and got the most out of a tutorial that was shy and seldom participated, and did quite a few audibles when needed. He was well accessible outside of class and gave great advice re: papers. Good guy and wouldn't hesitate to recommend.
